candidates.title: Women’s MTN Surf Recycled Jacket
candidates.snippet: Extremely comfortable and durable jacket. More insulated then expected yet lightweight. Perfect resort jacket that can also deliver on the skin track. Extremely water resistant and easy to move in.

candidates.title: Men’s MTN Surf Recycled Insulated Parka | Jones
candidates.snippet: Fabric is 100% recycled 20K waterproof 20K breathable four-way stretch two-layer laminate shell made without PFAS. Lined with 100% recycled polyester and insulated with 100% recycled PrimaLoft PURE insulation.

candidates.title: Women’s MTN Surf Recycled Pants | Jones
candidates.snippet: I love a pant that I don't have to wear long layers underneath and these are it! I am on the larger size and the women's L had more than enough room to be comfortable. Really nice for deep winter days and even held up in the Tahoe rain.
